section.title: What our neighbors say
section.subtitle: Real reviews from real customers in your community.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Northline arrived on time, explained everything clearly, and the price matched the quote exactly. I'll absolutely use them again.

items.name: James R.
items.quote: Honest, professional, and friendly. They treated my home with respect and finished ahead of schedule. Highly recommend.

items.name: Priya K.
items.quote: Best service experience we've had in years. Easy booking, fair pricing, and great communication start to finish.
